mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (place_id, user_id, content, rating) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{rating})
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.place_id, r.user_id, u.nickname, r.content, r.rating, r.created_at FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
